generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor integrated into BIM model to capture real-time occupancy data for building operations synchronization. Leverages Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data exchange."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor monitoring environmental conditions (temperature, humidity, CO2 levels) embedded within Building Control Systems (BCS) and modeled in BIM for automated commissioning."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor tracking energy consumption metrics from building systems, integrated into BIM for real-time operational monitoring and optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor monitoring lighting system operational states, part of TwinLight project integration for adaptive control mechanisms."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalSensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

instance LightingDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BimSemanticModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based semantic model containing geometry, topology, and component relationships serving as the semantic backbone for DT integration."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoMiddleware, EclipseDittoMiddleware
]

instance RuntimeDataModel : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured runtime data model containing sensor readings, control logic metadata, and middleware configurations for Eclipse Hono/Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, EnvironmentalDataTransmitted, EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted, LightingDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoMiddleware, EclipseDittoMiddleware
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 assets for interactive 3D representations of building operations, enabling immersive monitoring and simulation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Enabler
]

instance ControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Control models including reinforcement learning policies (BOREALIS) and rule-based logic (TwinLight) for adaptive building operations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelToModelTransformationEnabler
]

instance SensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw sensor data collected from physical building components, formatted in JSON/XML for standardized exchange via MQTT/AMQP protocols."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, EnvironmentalDataTransmitted, EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted, LightingDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoMiddleware, EclipseDittoMiddleware
]

instance ControlLogicData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed control logic data derived from sensor inputs, used for real-time adjustments in building operations (e.g., energy optimization)."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelToModelTransformationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware facilitating bidirectional real-time communication between physical assets and DT, supporting MQTT/AMQP protocols."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseDittoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto middleware enabling semantic-aware data exchange and synchronization between physical and virtual building representations."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 integration for high-fidelity 3D visualization of building operations, supporting immersive monitoring and scenario simulation."
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance ModelToModelTransformationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-to-model transformation tool generating deployable DT artifacts from BIM, enabling automated commissioning of control logic."
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveControlService, PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

instance ModelToTextTransformationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-to-text transformation tool generating runtime configurations for middleware (Hono/Ditto) and visualization layers from BIM models."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, InteractiveVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing continuous synchronization between physical building and DT, enabling real-time operational monitoring via Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingStateInsight, OperationalAnomalyInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service analyzing sensor data trends to predict energy consumption patterns and optimize building operations using reinforcement learning (BOREALIS)."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, PredictiveMaintenanceInsight
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing dynamic control logic (e.g., energy-efficient lighting via TwinLight) based on real-time sensor data and predefined policies."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyEfficientLightingAction, UserCentricAdjustmentAction
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing immersive 3D visualization of building operations through Unreal Engine 5, supporting scenario testing and performance evaluation."
    DTDFVocab:provides ScenarioSimulationInsight, PerformanceEvaluationInsight
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service analyzing sensor data trends to predict equipment failures and recommend maintenance actions before operational disruptions occur."
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceInsight, MaintenanceRecommendationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance BuildingStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insight into current operational state of the physical building, synchronized with DT via Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware."
]

instance OperationalAnomalyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of anomalies in building operations through real-time data comparison between physical and virtual representations."
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into energy consumption patterns and optimization opportunities derived from predictive analytics and sensor data trends."
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into potential equipment failures based on historical and real-time sensor data analysis."
]

instance ScenarioSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight generated from scenario simulations in Unreal Engine 5, evaluating building performance under different operational conditions."
]

instance PerformanceEvaluationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantitative evaluation of building performance metrics (e.g., energy efficiency, occupant comfort) derived from DT simulations."
]

instance EquipmentFailurePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into potential equipment failures based on historical and real-time sensor data analysis."
]

instance EnergyEfficientLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting systems based on occupancy and environmental conditions (TwinLight project implementation)."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance UserCentricAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of building operations (e.g., HVAC, lighting) based on real-time user feedback and occupancy patterns."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MaintenanceRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Recommendation for maintenance actions generated by predictive analytics service, prioritized based on failure risk assessment."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator controlling lighting systems within Building Control Systems (BCS), integrated into BIM for automated commissioning and bidirectional communication."
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator controlling HVAC systems, enabling real-time adjustments for energy optimization and occupant comfort based on DT insights."
]

instance Controller : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Central controller executing adaptive control logic (e.g., reinforcement learning policies from BOREALIS) for building operations optimization."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **virtual-to-physical interaction** is enabled through **bidirectional communication channels** established between the DT and the physical Building Control System (BCS). The DT generates control signals (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC setpoints) based on real-time analytics, optimization algorithms (e.g., reinforcement learning in BOREALIS), or user inputs. These signals are transmitted back to the physical actuators via **Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware**, ensuring low-latency execution. The framework supports **automated commissioning** and **runtime configuration management** to adapt control logic dynamically."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time**, ensuring continuous synchronization between the physical building and its DT. The framework supports **low-latency data exchange** through Eclipse Hono and Ditto, enabling immediate updates to the DT based on physical asset states. This real-time capability is critical for operational monitoring, control adjustments, and decision-making processes."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture (SOA)** with the following components:
  - **BIM Core**: Semantic backbone for asset representation.
  - **Middleware Layer**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data exchange.
  - **Control Layer**: Building Control Systems (BCS) and adaptive algorithms (e.g., reinforcement learning).
  - **Visualization Layer**: Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring.
  - **Extension Layer**: Custom services and plugins integrated via standardized APIs.
  The constellation supports **modular scalability**, allowing individual components (e.g., lighting sub-systems) to be deployed independently or as part of a larger DT ecosystem."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across **all life cycle stages** of the building, including:
  - **Design phase**: Leverages BIM models for initial DT setup.
  - **Construction phase**: Supports clash detection and progress tracking.
  - **Operation phase**: Enables real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and adaptive control.
  - **Refurbishment/Adaptation phase**: Facilitates data-driven decision-making for upgrades.
  The DT’s representation evolves from **as-designed (ideal)** to **as-operated**, with continuous synchronization ensuring alignment with the physical asset’s current state."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Real-time synchronization** (via Eclipse Hono/Ditto),
  - **Model validation** (semantic consistency checks),
  - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** (quantifying alignment with the physical asset).
  The framework minimizes semantic drift by embedding runtime semantics directly into BIM models, ensuring the DT remains a faithful representation of the physical building."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical twin (PT) and the DT is established through **Eclipse Hono and Ditto**, which provide real-time data exchange and bidirectional communication. The middleware supports **standardized protocols** for seamless integration with building control systems and operational data sources, ensuring low-latency synchronization."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT framework adheres to **AECO-specific standards**, particularly **Building Information Modeling (BIM)**, which serves as the semantic backbone for integrating static and runtime data. The approach ensures compatibility with existing AECO systems and workflows, facilitating interoperability and scalability."
]
